subject: Re: Generating initial reconstruction after exporting particles
body:
I overcame this with 2D boxing by doing a 3D Classification without
alignment for 1-2 iterations. I found the ref is not too critical there but
never tried with completely different ref.

H

On Wed, Mar 5, 2025 at 1:09 PM Philipp Erdmann <philipp.stawski@gmail.com>
wrote:

> *Hi Ricardo,*
>
> I think it is currently the only way.
>
> For this reason we currently always extract —3d, too.
>
> Best,
>
> Philipp.
>
> Sent from my iPhone
>
> On 5 Mar 2025, at 17:40, Ricardo Righetto <ricardorighetto@gmail.com>
> wrote:
>
> ﻿
> Hi,
>
> I might be missing something obvious, but I don't see a way of generating
> an initial average from my particles STAR file when exporting particles
> from WarpTools using --2d. If using --3d, we can use relion_reconstruct_mpi
> as before in Windows Warp. Is that the only way?
>
> Thanks in advance!
>
> --
> Ricardo Diogo Righetto
>
